Resolve Conflict Without Litigation

Neutral, confidential mediation for workplace, family, commercial, and estate disputes in Saskatchewan and across Canada. Structured process. No side-taking.

Book a Free Consultation

Neutral third-party mediation • Confidential process • Workplace, family, commercial & estate disputes

Areas of Practice

Workplace & Organizational Mediation

Structured, neutral mediation for workplace conflict, team breakdown, and organizational disputes.

Learn More →

Family & Separation Mediation

Neutral facilitation for separation, parenting arrangements, and family disputes — structured to protect relationships where possible.

Learn More →

Commercial Dispute Mediation

Business dispute resolution focused on preserving operations, relationships, and confidentiality.

Learn More →

Estate & Inheritance Mediation

Structured resolution for inheritance disputes, executor conflicts, and estate administration disagreements.

Learn More →

How the Process Works

  1. Free initial consultation (30 minutes)
  2. Structured mediation sessions (individual or joint)
  3. Facilitated resolution or agreement documentation

Start with a Confidential Consultation

No obligation. No pressure. A 30-minute assessment to determine whether mediation is appropriate for your situation.

Book a Free Consultation

Meridian Dispute Resolution Inc

Mediation services across Canada. Based in Saskatchewan. Not legal counsel. Not therapy.
